# Test: apx breaking for Parquet schemas
# Verifies breaking change detection with Parquet format (native Go, no external tools)

# Test breaking detection — new required column (should fail)
! exec apx breaking --against=v1.parquet v2_breaking.parquet
stderr 'added as required'

# Test with explicit format flag
! exec apx breaking --format=parquet --against=v1.parquet v2_breaking.parquet
stderr 'added as required'

# Test safe change — additive optional column (should pass)
exec apx breaking --against=v1.parquet v2_additive.parquet

# Test column removal — breaking
! exec apx breaking --against=v1.parquet v2_removed.parquet
stderr 'removed'

# Test type change — breaking
! exec apx breaking --against=v1.parquet v2_type_change.parquet
stderr 'physical type changed'

# Test required to optional — safe (relaxing constraint)
exec apx breaking --against=v1.parquet v2_relax.parquet

# Test missing --against flag (should fail with helpful error)
! exec apx breaking v1.parquet
stderr '--against is required'

-- v1.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
}
-- v2_breaking.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
  required binary source (STRING);
}
-- v2_additive.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
  optional binary metadata (JSON);
}
-- v2_removed.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
}
-- v2_type_change.parquet --
message event {
  required binary id (STRING);
  required int64 event_type;
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
}
-- v2_relax.parquet --
message event {
  optional binary id (STRING);
  required binary event_type (STRING);
  required int64 timestamp (TIMESTAMP_MILLIS);
}
